Video.summary: Carl Reiner and Melba Moore guest star on this episode.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Carl Reiner, Melba Moore

Video.summary: Guest star Lucille Ball joins Carol for a glittering showbiz sketch, "The Rock Sisters!"
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Lucille Ball, George Carlin

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence stars. Includes a take-off of film noir "Laura." Also: Stella Toddler meets The Oldest Man.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Jonathan Winters returns as Carol's guest, highlighted by a dual role in "The Wonderful World Of Hospitals."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Jonathan Winters, Dionne Warwick

Video.summary: Ruth Buzzi and Richard Crenna take part in a salute to the "bad girls" of cinema.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Ruth Buzzi, Richard Crenna

Video.summary: Guest stars Bernadette Peters, Nancy Wilson, and The Burgundy Street Singers.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Nancy Wilson, Bernadette Peters

Video.summary: Frank Gorshin dazzles with his famous impressions, then joins up with Lana Turner in a sketch about Bluebeard.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Frank Gorshin, Lana Turner

Video.summary: Don Adams plays a talk show host beset with technical difficulties and Carol's agitated husband.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Lesley Ann Warren, Don Adams

Video.summary: Art Carney & Pat Carroll guest. Art plays an exterminator, then he & Pat appear on "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Pat Carroll, Art Carney

Video.summary: William Conrad & Isabel Sanford star! Short spoofs highlight this episode, which also features "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: William Conrad, Isabel Sanford

Video.summary: You get two Carols for the price of one when Carol Channing guests!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Carol Channing

Video.summary: Tim has to write a eulogy for his best friend. On "As The Stomach Turns", things turn bionic after a funeral.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Carol & Sis come home from a costume party. Meanwhile, Carol and Harvey delight with a pair of sketches.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Nancy Wilson and Donald O'Connor star. Featuring a housewife plagued by ads and a spoof of "College Musical."
Video.title: Nancy Wilson, Donald O'Connor

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence & Tim Conway star! Steve plays a talk show host, then solves a mystery in a spoof with Tim.
Video.title: Tim Conway, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Betty White joins in the latest installment of "The Family" wherein Mama has decided to clean up her attic.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Betty White

Video.summary: The Pointer Sisters join Carol in a rockin' musical spoof of "Cinderella" in tonight's episode.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Pointer Sisters

Video.summary: Lily Tomlin & Steve Lawrence star! Lily plays a prison matron while Steve plays a crime boss on his honeymoon.
Video.title: Lily Tomlin, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Nanette Fabray and Mel Torme lend their star power to a show-biz spectacle: the movie spoof, "43rd Street."
Video.title: Mel Torme, Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: Alan King & Lena Zavaroni join Carol for sketches set on Hollywood Boulevard, a baseball game, and a bus stop.
Video.title: Alan King, Lena Zavaroni

Video.summary: John Byner and Petula Clark head downtown to the show.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: John Byner, Petula Clark

Video.summary: Michele Lee and Flip Wilson dazzle with song and stand-up comedy, and Carol vamps in "V.I.P." as Mae East.
Video.title: Michele Lee, Flip Wilson

Video.summary: Carol's guests are George Chakiris and Shirley Jones!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Shirley Jones, George Chakiris

Video.summary: Sketches include Carol as an old lady feeding birds, Tim as a wacky pharmacist, and Carol & Vicki on a cruise.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Mickey Rooney and John Davidson guest. Davidson sings, Rooney stars in a Western, and Carol must choose.
Video.title: Mickey Rooney, John Davidson

Video.summary: Flip Wilson and Vikki Carr accept Carol's mission: appear in "Mission: Improbable"...which includes a cameo!
Video.title: Flip Wilson, Vikki Carr

Video.summary: Jack Klugman & Tony Randall guest. Jack sings with Carol, while Tony appears in a tribute to Broadway sketch.
Video.title: Jack Klugman, Tony Randall

Video.summary: When Mama and The Family play Charades, things turn to chaos. Also: a despondent bar patron meets her match.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Alan King stars as a psychiatrist. Also: Carol tries making breakfast; a nurse & patient recognize each other.
Video.title: Alan King

Video.summary: Dom DeLuise is Carol's guest for a night of sketched, including a murder investigation and "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Dom Deluise

Video.summary: George Chakiris and Shirley Jones guest. Chakiris joins for Q&A, while Jones is a secretary in "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Shirley Jones, George Chakiris

Video.summary: Carl Reiner guests. Featuring WWII film "The Plot To Hurt Hitler." Also: "The Writer" & "Terminal Hospital."
Video.title: Carl Reiner

Video.summary: Harvey leads a "Fireside Chat" with the First Family. Carol interviews Hugh Handsome, and a cameo by Bob Hope!
Video.title: Bob Hope

Video.summary: Jane Connell and Tim Conway star! Harvey & Tim are tipsy friends coming home. Also: The Arabian Nights spoof.
Video.title: Jane Connell, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Joanne Woodward spends an evening with "The Family." Joanne plays a past schoolmate of Eunice's.
Video.title: Joanne Woodward
